17.dv: from the same as H6081 (עֵפֶר); fawn-like;

18.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)

18.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)

18.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
18.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
18.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

18.gl: properly, a buying, i.e. acquisition; concretely, a piece of property (land or living); also the sum paid
18.kj: (he that is) bought, possession, piece, purchase.

18.gl: Abraham, the later name of Abram
18.dv: contracted from H1 (אָב) and an unused root (probably meaning to be populous); father of a multitude;

19.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
19.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
19.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

19.gl: properly, the hind part; generally used as an adverb or conjunction, after (in various senses)
19.kj: after (that, -ward), again, at, away from, back (from, -side), behind, beside, by, follow (after, -ing), forasmuch, from, hereafter, hinder end, [phrase] out (over) live, [phrase]
(adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
19.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

19.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
19.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
19.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

19.gl: Abraham, the later name of Abram
19.dv: contracted from H1 (אָב) and an unused root (probably meaning to be populous); father of a multitude;

19.kj: country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.
19.dv: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out;
